intro.name: Dr. Stefano Icardi
intro.description1: I provide psychological support and individual therapy for adults. My approach is relational, integrated, and personalized.
intro.description2: I am registered with the Order of Psychologists of Lombardy, Register A

formazione.title: Education
formazione.registration: Register A - Order of Psychologists of Lombardy

attivita.title: Practice
attivita.description1: I provide psychological support and individual therapy for adults, with particular attention to relational dynamics and personal growth.
attivita.description2: The therapeutic journey is focused on the individual with the aim of supporting them in processing critical moments in life that create distress and that they feel unable to manage independently.
attivita.description3: In the process, we focus on the individual and how they face different situations (relationships, work, and daily life), with particular attention to relational dynamics, while enhancing and strengthening the resources they already possess.

hero.title: Podcast
hero.subtitle: Reflections and insights on psychology and mental well-being
hero.description: In this podcast, I share thoughts and reflections on psychology, relationships, and personal growth. Short and accessible episodes to accompany you in your daily life.

subscribe.title: Listen Anywhere
subscribe.description: Listen to the podcast on Mixcloud
